heading: Program authority
label: 12891 Program authority
notes: Amendments1992— struck out “(a) ” before “The Secretary is authorized” and subsec. (b) which read as follows: “.—There are authorized to be appropriated for grants under this part $36,000,000 for fiscal year 1991, and $195,000,000 for fiscal year 1992. Any amounts appropriated pursuant to this subsection shall remain available until expended.”Pub. L. 102–550In GeneralAuthorization of Appropriations

children.text: planning grants to help applicants develop homeownership programs in accordance with this part; and
implementation grants to enable applicants to carry out homeownership programs in accordance with this part.
